title: Strategy Marketplace and User Controls
objective: Build strategy marketplace capabilities where users can discover, enable, configure, and run strategies in paper or live mode safely.
prd_mapping: Section 4: User enables strategy and execution flow
scope: Marketplace catalog with strategy metadata and performance snapshots.
Enable/disable workflow with guardrails and confirmations.
Paper/live toggle controls and compliance checks.
deliverables: Strategy enrollment state model and audit logs.
User control panel for mode, limits, and pause/resume.
blocked_by: Final strategy templates and legal disclaimers
success_metrics: User can activate strategy in paper mode in under 1 minute.
Live mode requires explicit prechecks and confirmations.
Marketplace views show latest strategy stats.
risks: Users enabling overly risky configs without safeguards.
open_questions: Who can publish strategies: admin only or approved users?
Do users need strategy version pinning?
